description: I'm Carl Abou Saada Nujaim and I'm a 1st year PhD student in Human-Computer Interaction at Université Paris-Saclay with a background in Computer Science and Animation. I am supervised by Wendy Mackay and Michel Beaudouin-Lafon. My research focuses on bridging the gap between designers and developers when creating interactive systems, as well as making HCI concepts and theories more accessible to them throughout this process. You can also check out my LinkedIn and my CV.
